heading: Advisory committees
label: 2246 Advisory committees
text: The Chairman of the Board, subject to the approval of the Board, may establish one or more advisory committees in accordance with chapter 10 of title 5 and may appoint to such committee or committees individuals who are members of the Federal Farm Credit Board when such Board is terminated by the Farm Credit Amendments Act of 1985.
notes: References in TextThe Farm Credit Amendments Act of 1985, referred to in text, is , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 1985 Amendment note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 99–20599 Stat. 1678section 2001 of this titleDec. 23, 1985

Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 10 of title 5” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act”.Pub. L. 117–2861988— inserted “, subject to the approval of the Board,” after “Chairman of the Board”.Pub. L. 100–2331985— substituted provisions respecting advisory committees for provisions respecting compliance by the Governor with orders of the Federal Farm Credit Board.Pub. L. 99–205
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective thirty days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–205section 401 of Pub. L. 99–205section 2001 of this titleDec. 23, 1985
